# green

Wraps its argument in the ANSI escape codes for green text.

```rad
green(_item: any) -> str
```

```rad
green("Hello")        // -> "Hello" wrapped in the green escape
green(42)             // -> "42" wrapped in the green escape
```

## See also

`red`, `yellow`, `color_rgb`
